ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the flight simulation */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight simulation */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the aircraft during the flight */,
  "direction_x" REAL /* Direction of the aircraft in the x-axis */,
  "direction_y" REAL /* Direction of the aircraft in the y-axis */,
  "direction_z" REAL /* Direction of the aircraft in the z-axis */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft used in the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot who conducted the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "flight_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_inputs" (
  "control_input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control input */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the control input belongs to */,
  "input_throttle" REAL /* Throttle input */,
  "input_pitch" REAL /* Pitch input */,
  "input_yaw" REAL /* Yaw input */,
  "input_roll" REAL /* Roll input */,
  "roll_p" REAL /* Roll P input */,
  "roll_i" REAL /* Roll I input */,
  "roll_d" REAL /* Roll D input */,
  "input_time" TEXT /* Time at which the control input was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_inputs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the performance metric belongs to */,
  "drag_x" REAL /* Drag in the x-axis */,
  "drag_y" REAL /* Drag in the y-axis */,
  "drag_z" REAL /* Drag in the z-axis */,
  "vertical_velocity" REAL /* Vertical velocity of the aircraft */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll of the aircraft */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the aircraft */,
  "has_fuel" INTEGER /* Whether the aircraft has fuel */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Current fuel level of the aircraft */,
  "fuel_consumption_rate" REAL /* Rate of fuel consumption */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the aircraft */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure during the flight */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the aircraft (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_performance_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, engineer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_inputs" (
  "pitch_input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch input */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the pitch input belongs to */,
  "input_pitch" REAL /* Pitch input */,
  "pitch_p" REAL /* Pitch P input */,
  "pitch_i" REAL /* Pitch I input */,
  "pitch_d" REAL /* Pitch D input */,
  "input_time" TEXT /* Time at which the pitch input was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitch_inputs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yaw_inputs" (
  "yaw_input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yaw input */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the yaw input belongs to */,
  "input_yaw" REAL /* Yaw input */,
  "yaw_p" REAL /* Yaw P input */,
  "yaw_i" REAL /* Yaw I input */,
  "yaw_d" REAL /* Yaw D input */,
  "input_time" TEXT /* Time at which the yaw input was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yaw_input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yaw_inputs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight simulation */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the simulation belongs to */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight simulation */,
  "simulation_time" TEXT /* Time of the flight simulation */,
  "simulation_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the simulation */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_simulations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft configuration */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft the configuration belongs to */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date of the aircraft configuration */,
  "configuration_description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft configuration */,
  "configuration_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "configuration_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_configurations_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the aircraft */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the reading belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor at the time of the reading */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight plan */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight plan */,
  "plan_time" TEXT /* Time of the flight plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the flight plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight plan (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "plan_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the flight plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waypoints" (
  "waypoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waypoint */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the waypoint belongs to */,
  "waypoint_date" TEXT /* Date of the waypoint */,
  "waypoint_time" TEXT /* Time of the waypoint */,
  "waypoint_description" TEXT /* Description of the waypoint */,
  "waypoint_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the waypoint */,
  "waypoint_status" TEXT /* Status of the waypoint (e.g., reached, not reached) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waypoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waypoints_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES flight_plans ("plan_id")
)
